chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-69 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 02.02.2026 Mr. Sajjad Ali Kaka, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Nadeem Tagar, Counsel for petitioners, who are present in Court. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh along with Inspector Manzoor Ali on behalf of SSP Hyderabad and SIP Dileejan Rind on behalf of SHO PS Qasimabad ----- Through this petition, the petitioners seek protection against harassment being caused to them by the official Respondents at the behest of private Respondents, who are brothers and relatives of Petitioner No.1 Mst. Sawera, on account of their freewill. Learned A.A.G files reply / written statements / comments of respondents No.2 & 4, which are taken on record. The police officials present in Court have denied any harassment being caused to the petitioners and submit that they shall act strictly in accordance with law. Learned A.A.G submits that the official Respondents will act strictly in accordance with law and will provide due protection to the Petitioners. Learned counsel for the Petitioners being satisfied with such statement seeks disposal of the Petition. Accordingly, the Petition stands disposed of with directions to the official Respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and ensure that no harassment is caused to the Petitioners and the protection is provided to them as and when they needed. JUDGE Ali Haider
